title: Kokinwakashu: The Anthology of Ancient and Modern Poetry
description: The first imperially commissioned poetry anthology: the kana preface defines Japanese aesthetics for a millennium.
introduction: The first imperially commissioned poetry anthology: the kana preface defines Japanese aesthetics for a millennium.

translation.original_text: やまとうたは、人の心を種として、万の言の葉とぞなれりける。
translation.text: The poetry of Japan takes the human heart as its seed and grows into a myriad leaves of words.
